name: xcircl-agent
description: Open-source MCP server and SDK for the xcircl regulated-care provider data API

scripts.build: npm run build -w @xcircl/sdk && npm run build -w @xcircl/mcp-server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @xcircl/sdk && npm run typecheck -w @xcircl/sdk && npm run typecheck -w @xcircl/mcp-server
